name: Hecahands Makibel
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>見えざる手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヘカトンケイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マキブエル
desc: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Makibel" once per turn. You can reveal this card in your hand; Fusion Summon 1 "Hecahands" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field, including this card in the hand. If an Illusion Fusion Monster(s) is sent to your GY while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can add this card to your hand.
mnst_eff: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Makibel" once per turn. You can reveal this card in your hand; Fusion Summon 1 "Hecahands" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field, including this card in the hand. If an Illusion Fusion Monster(s) is sent to your GY while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can add this card to your hand.
eff: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Makibel" once per turn. You can reveal this card in your hand; Fusion Summon 1 "Hecahands" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field, including this card in the hand. If an Illusion Fusion Monster(s) is sent to your GY while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can add this card to your hand.

action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses itself as a Fusion Material
Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
